name: description-list
description: A read-only label->value list rendered as a native <dl> grid: each row a <dt> term + <dd> definition (description-list.item), laid out in N columns via the --lv-dl-cols custom property, with per-item columnSpan. The detail-page primitive the kit's AdminViewView.Section (its ordered label-to-display map) and Filament's infolist section grid map onto: a structured READ of a record, terms left/above, values right/below. Native dt/dd association (no extra ARIA). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the description-list partial (+ its description-list/item child) to your JTE root at lievit/description-list.jte, reached as @template.lievit.description-list(columns=2, content=@`...`). Fill it with description-list.item rows (term + content value); the value content can be a plain string or an infolist-entry (badge / swatch / icon). columns drives the grid; an item may span more columns via columnSpan. The source is yours: edit freely.
